basic_details.job_title: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 – 50 Posts, Apply Online by 31 July 2026
basic_details.short_information: This recruitment is exclusively for local candidates of Sikkim. Posts are in Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service. Only online applications are accepted - no other mode of submission will be entertained.

application_fee.details: The application fee for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 is ₹200/- (Rupees Two Hundred only). This fee is applicable to all candidates and must be paid online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard). The fee once deposited is non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other purpose.

qualification.details: To apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper 2026, candidates must be local candidates of Sikkim and must fulfil all prescribed eligibility conditions - including educational qualification and age - as on the closing date of 31 July 2026. Candidates awaiting final results are not eligible to apply, as per Notification No. 177/GEN/DOP dated 29.01.2026. | Candidates must satisfy both of the following requirements: | Class XII passed (or equivalent) from any recognized Board, with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class X (Ten). Must have knowledge of basic computer applications and possess a certificate or diploma of at least 3 (three) months basic course in computer application, or a higher qualification in computer science / information technology from a recognized board/university. | Must be able to read, write, and speak in one of the State languages of Sikkim. Must be conversant with local customs and traditions of Sikkim.

salary_details.accounts clerk / junior storekeeper: Level-7 (Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service Pay Matrix)
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be placed in Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service under the Finance Department, Government of Sikkim. However, during the period of Probation, Apprenticeship, or Training, pay shall be governed by Notification No. 489/GEN/DOP dated 31.10.2011.

selection_process: SPSC will conduct a Written Examination for shortlisting candidates. The detailed scheme and pattern of the written examination is available in Appendix - I of the official notification
and the syllabus can be downloaded from the Sikkim Public Service Commission website at www.spsc.sikkim.gov.in.
The selection stages are as follows:
Written Examination - Candidates are admitted provisionally

subject to satisfying all eligibility conditions. Document Scrutiny - Candidates who qualify in the written examination will be called for verification of original documents. Shortlisted candidates must submit attested photocopies of all relevant documents on the dates specified by the Commission.
Admission to all stages of the examination is purely provisional. If
at any stage during the process
a candidate is found to have not fulfilled the eligibility conditions
their candidature will be cancelled without notice. No TA/DA is admissible for attending the examination.
Candidates must bring a Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card
or Driving Licence) along with a valid e-Admit Card at the examination centre.
how_to_apply: Applications are accepted online only through the official SPSC website. Applications received through any other mode will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected. Candidates must read all instructions provided on the website carefully before filling in the form.
Read the full advertisement and instructions carefully before beginning the application.
Register on the portal and create a login if you are a new user.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details.
Upload all required documents as specified.
Pay the application fee of ₹200/- online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard).
Submit the application on or before 31 July 2026.
Download and save the confirmation of your submitted application for future reference.
E-Admit Cards can be downloaded from the SPSC website after the Commission publishes a notice for the same.

Important: The Commission will not be responsible for any application submitted after the stipulated date and time. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 31 July 2026. Applications submitted after this date will not be accepted, and SPSC will not be responsible for late submissions.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 50 posts of Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper are available under Advertisement No. 21/SPSC/EXAM/2026, distributed across multiple reservation categories including UR, BL, OBC, ST, SC, Primitive Tribe, Most Backward Classes, and WSS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class XII (or equivalent) from a recognized Board with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class X. Additionally, a certificate or diploma of at least 3 months basic computer application course (or higher) from a recognized board/university is mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 40 years of age as on 31 July 2026, as per Notification No. M(3)/(55)/GEN/DOP/Pt.III dated 03/07/2019.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹200/- for all candidates, payable online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard). The fee is non-refundable once paid.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper in Sikkim?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed at Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service under the Finance Department, Government of Sikkim. During probation/training, pay will be as per Notification No. 489/GEN/DOP dated 31.10.2011.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of a Written Examination followed by Document Scrutiny. Candidates who qualify in the written exam will be called for verification of original documents on dates specified by the Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Is this recruitment open to candidates from outside Sikkim?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is exclusively for local candidates of Sikkim. Candidates must possess either a Sikkim Subject Certificate or a Certificate of Identification issued by the competent authority of the State Government.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online at the official SPSC website: http://spsc.sikkim.gov.in/. No other mode of application is accepted. Applications received through any other means will be summarily rejected.

faq.question: Q10. Can employed candidates apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, but employed candidates must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their Head of Department at the time of document verification. Currently employed candidates in any government department must obtain this NOC before appearing for document scrutiny.

title: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 – 50 Posts, Apply Online by 31 July 2026
